name: Suspicious Python Execution with Inline Code
description: Detects Python interpreters executing suspicious inline code patterns
query:
// Detect Python executing inline malicious payloads
// Trigger on python -c with suspicious imports or commands
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)python[23]?(\.exe)?$"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)-c.*(import\s+(socket|subprocess|os|ctypes|base64)|exec\(|eval\(|__import__)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
